name: MYRadiologyImplementationGuide
title: Malaysian National Radiology Interoperability And Conformance Guide
publisher: Data Team, Digital Health Division, Ministry of Health Malaysia

contact.name: Data Team, Digital Health Division, Ministry of Health Malaysia
Data Team, Digital Health Division, Ministry of Health Malaysia

description: Draft national FHIR R4 radiology implementation guide for Malaysia, aligned to the national MY Core baseline and published as the computable core of a wider one-repository radiology conformance specification.

grouping.name: FHIR Profiles
grouping.description: Core Malaysian radiology profiles that define the computable exchange layer for order, workflow, scheduling, procedure, study, report, observation, and document packaging.

grouping.name: Terminology Artefacts
grouping.description: Value sets and code systems that support workflow states, accession policy options, modality coding, procedure coding, report coding, and structured findings.

grouping.name: Capability Statements
grouping.description: Actor-specific conformance expectations for order placer, workflow manager, archive publisher, viewer consumer, and validation participants.

grouping.name: Naming Systems
grouping.description: PROVISIONAL naming system resources that distinguish placeholder identifier URIs from value format, issuing authority, and future governance decisions.

grouping.name: Examples
grouping.description: Worked examples that illustrate the expected JSON and XML payload shape for profiles and the end-to-end order-to-report workflow bundle.

resource.name: MY Radiology ServiceRequest
resource.description: Radiology imaging order profile for Malaysian deployments.

resource.name: MY Radiology Task
resource.description: Workflow tracking profile for order receipt, acceptance, scheduling, progress, completion, rejection, cancellation, and amendment visibility.

resource.name: MY Radiology Appointment
resource.description: Optional booking and scheduling profile where Appointment is exposed through FHIR.

resource.name: MY Radiology Procedure
resource.description: Performed imaging procedure profile linking the originating order to the completed act.

resource.name: MY Radiology ImagingStudy
resource.description: FHIR-facing imaging study metadata aligned to the underlying DICOM study.

resource.name: MY Radiology DiagnosticReport
resource.description: Radiology report profile for preliminary, final, amended, and addendum reporting scenarios.

resource.name: MY Radiology Observation
resource.description: Structured radiology finding or measurement profile used when narrative reporting alone is insufficient.

resource.name: MY Radiology DocumentReference
resource.description: Optional document-centric profile for packaged report exchange and cross-enterprise sharing scenarios.

resource.name: HIS Order Placer Capability Statement
resource.description: Client capability expectations for a HIS or CPOE partner placing radiology orders and reading downstream workflow information.

resource.name: RIS Workflow Manager Capability Statement
resource.description: Server capability expectations for a RIS partner acting as the operational order filler and workflow manager.

resource.name: PACS Metadata Publisher Capability Statement
resource.description: Server capability expectations for a PACS or VNA partner exposing imaging metadata to FHIR consumers.

resource.name: Viewer Consumer Capability Statement
resource.description: Client capability expectations for an EHR or viewer partner consuming study metadata and report content.

resource.name: Validation Consumer Capability Statement
resource.description: Client capability expectations for national validation and conformance testing participants.

resource.name: MY Radiology Workflow State ValueSet
resource.description: Preferred business status codes for radiology Task synchronisation.

resource.name: MY Radiology Accession Pattern ValueSet
resource.description: Candidate accession identifier patterns carried for governance and sandbox design.

resource.name: MY Radiology Procedure Code ValueSet
resource.description: Preferred imaging procedure catalogue binding using a PROVISIONAL RadLex mirror strategy.

resource.name: MY Radiology Modality ValueSet
resource.description: Example DICOM-aligned modality codes for imaging study publication.

resource.name: MY Radiology Report Code ValueSet
resource.description: Representative report codes for radiology diagnostic report exchange.

resource.name: MY Radiology Finding Code ValueSet
resource.description: Placeholder structured finding envelope using SNOMED CT and LOINC.

resource.name: MY Radiology Document Type ValueSet
resource.description: Document typing codes for packaged radiology reports.

resource.name: MY Radiology Workflow State CodeSystem
resource.description: Technical workflow status codes used in Task.businessStatus.

resource.name: MY Radiology Accession Pattern CodeSystem
resource.description: Draft policy-option codes describing candidate accession numbering strategies.

resource.name: MY RadLex Procedure Mirror Placeholder
resource.description: PROVISIONAL placeholder code system for a future locally hosted RadLex mirror.

resource.name: Patient Identifier Naming System
resource.description: PROVISIONAL naming system for the future national patient identifier domain.

resource.name: Facility Identifier Naming System
resource.description: PROVISIONAL naming system for facility identifiers.

resource.name: Healthcare Worker Identifier Naming System
resource.description: PROVISIONAL naming system for healthcare worker identifiers.

resource.name: Accession Identifier Naming System
resource.description: PROVISIONAL naming system for accession identifiers using the recommended sandbox draft pattern.

resource.name: Radiology Order Identifier Naming System
resource.description: PROVISIONAL naming system for radiology order identifiers issued by order placer systems.

resource.name: Radiology ServiceRequest Example
resource.description: Example imaging order showing placer order and accession identifiers, clinical indication, requested procedure, and requester context.

resource.name: Radiology Task Example
resource.description: Example workflow tracking task representing an accepted and scheduled order.

resource.name: Radiology Appointment Example
resource.description: Example booked appointment for a scheduled radiology slot.

resource.name: Radiology Procedure Example
resource.description: Example performed imaging procedure derived from the originating order.

resource.name: Radiology ImagingStudy Example
resource.description: Example study metadata aligned to a DICOM study and linked to the order and performed procedure.

resource.name: Radiology DiagnosticReport Example
resource.description: Example final radiology report linked to the imaging study and structured finding.

resource.name: Radiology Observation Example
resource.description: Example structured finding used to supplement a narrative radiology report.

resource.name: Radiology DocumentReference Example
resource.description: Example packaged radiology report document for sharing scenarios.

resource.name: Radiology Order Workflow Bundle Example
resource.description: Example collection bundle showing the main order-to-report workflow resources together.

resource.name: Patient Example
resource.description: Shared patient context used by the radiology workflow examples.

resource.name: Encounter Example
resource.description: Shared encounter context used by the workflow examples.

resource.name: Organisation Example
resource.description: Example imaging organisation used across the workflow.

resource.name: Location Example
resource.description: Example imaging location used for scheduling and procedure context.

resource.name: Practitioner Example
resource.description: Example radiologist practitioner used across reporting and procedure examples.

resource.name: PractitionerRole Example
resource.description: Example radiologist role used as the requester in the workflow examples.
